/usr/sbin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/stage2_minidemo.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/stage2_minidemo.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/stage2_minidemo.dir/__/__/src/application.cpp.o CMakeFiles/stage2_minidemo.dir/__/__/src/platform/application_xcb.cpp.o CMakeFiles/stage2_minidemo.dir/__/__/src/window_builder.cpp.o CMakeFiles/stage2_minidemo.dir/__/__/src/window.cpp.o CMakeFiles/stage2_minidemo.dir/__/__/src/platform/window_xcb.cpp.o CMakeFiles/stage2_minidemo.dir/__/__/src/platform/xcb_helpers.cpp.o -o stage2_minidemo  -Wl,-rpath,/home/charliechen/anatomy_gui/src/tutorial/anatomy_gui_for_tutorials/stage2/build_ci ../../libAnatomyGui.so -lxcb
